header.title: Verify Your Email
header.subtitle: A verification link has been sent to your email address to secure and confirm your account.

steps.two: Locate the email from CASA containing the verification link.
steps.three: Click on the provided verification link.
steps.four: Return here and sign in to your account.

resendEmail.title: Resend
resendEmail.success: An verification link has been re-sent to your email address.
resendEmail.timeLeft: You will be able to resend a link after the countdown:

error.invalidOrExpiredToken: Your token is invalid or expired.
